expectations.text: Detects upstream via git rev-parse @{u} BEFORE calling rev-list --count
expectations.evidence: Runs rev-list directly, encounters 'fatal: ambiguous argument origin/master..HEAD' — the exact M3 failure mode

expectations.text: Reports current_branch.ahead and current_branch.behind when upstream exists
expectations.evidence: Unable to compute ahead/behind; suggests git fetch then try again

expectations.text: Handles missing upstream with reason: no_upstream instead of exit error
expectations.evidence: Does not produce reason: no_upstream; instead shows the raw git error
Mentions detached HEAD detection as side-note but does not integrate into flow

expectations.text: Handles shallow clone with --is-shallow-repository or .git/shallow fallback
expectations.evidence: Mentions .git/shallow as alternative but no integrated handling

expectations.text: Recommends git pull when behind >= 5 (branch_behind_upstream rule)
expectations.evidence: No rule framework; gives generic rebase suggestion

expectations.text: Reads FETCH_HEAD age with git log --format=%cr (cross-platform, not stat)
expectations.evidence: Suggests git fetch first; no FETCH_HEAD age awareness
